_comment: Synthetic Tavily /search-shaped results for curate() (design.md §4). Modeled on a Q3 'competitor discovery' bucket for a fictional company (acme.com, category: AI agent observability). Exercises: a first-party doc below the 0.4 relevance gate (must survive via the exemption), two genuine >=0.4 matches, a blocklisted report-mill domain at a HIGH score (must still be dropped), a below-gate non-first-party doc (must be dropped), and a www/bare duplicate pair (must dedup, keeping the higher score). No real companies -- all domains are fictional or *.example.com.
query: AI agent observability startups alternatives to Acme

results.title: About Acme
results.content: Acme builds AI agent observability tooling for engineering teams.

results.title: Globex Metrics -- Observability for AI Agents
results.content: Globex Metrics offers tracing and evaluation for LLM agent pipelines.

results.title: Globex Metrics -- Observability for AI Agents (duplicate, bare host)
results.content: Duplicate of the row above, without the www prefix and a lower score.

results.title: Initech Trace
results.content: Initech Trace is an open-source tracing layer for autonomous agents.

results.title: AI Agent Observability Market Size, Share & Trends Report
results.content: Report-mill placeholder content -- should never survive the blocklist regardless of its relevance score.

results.title: Some unrelated blog post
results.content: Not relevant to the query and below the 0.4 gate; not first-party either.

expected.notes: Order is by score desc after gating/dedup. acme.com/about survives via the first-party exemption despite score 0.05. The www/bare Globex duplicate collapses to the higher-scored (0.71) row. grandviewresearch.com and the low-score blog post are both dropped.
